# OpenClaw alternative: Manus Desktop (My Computer)

My Computer on Manus Desktop lets AI work on your local files securely—no terminal, no API keys, no hassle.

Manus Desktop My Computer interface showing simple folder-based access

## Comparing OpenClaw and Manus Desktop (My Computer)

When evaluating an AI agent desktop tool, what matters isn't the demo. It's how it handles your daily work, keeps your files safe, and delivers real results.

Get started

## How to use Manus Desktop (My Computer)

Manus Desktop brings cloud AI to your local machine through My Computer. No terminal commands, API keys, or complex dependencies needed.

Download and install

Download and install [...] ### How much does OpenClaw cost vs Manus?

OpenClaw is free to download, but you have to pay for your own LLM API costs, which can add up fast depending on your usage. Manus uses a simple subscription model that includes access to top-tier AI models, so you never get a surprise bill.

### Can AI agents like Manus control your desktop?

Yes. With the My Computer feature, Manus can read files and run commands. But it only works inside the folders you choose, and it asks for your permission before doing anything critical. It operates within a strict boundary that you define.

### What is the purpose of computer-use AI agents? [...] ### What is OpenClaw and how does it work?

OpenClaw is an open-source AI agent that connects large language models to your computer. It lets you run tasks and manage files through a chat interface. However, you need solid technical skills to set it up, configure the environment, and keep it running smoothly.

### What are the best OpenClaw alternatives in 2026?

Manus Desktop is the top alternative. It gives you a fully managed, secure workspace where you control exactly what the AI can access. Other open-source options exist, but they usually require a lot of technical setup, API key management, and ongoing maintenance.

## An Alternative Approach: Building Apps With YouWare

Manus focuses on using AI to operate within your existing computer environment. Another approach is to let AI generate the tools you need instead.

YouWare is an AI app builder that creates applications directly from natural-language prompts. Instead of automating tasks across multiple tools, users can generate a dedicated app that performs a specific function. [...] ### Is Manus AI free?

Pricing and availability for Manus may vary, as the product is still evolving and being rolled out. At the time of writing, access may be limited or offered through a waitlist. For those exploring alternatives, tools like YouWare offer free plans for building AI-powered apps without needing to install a desktop agent.

 Cheaper Manus AI Alternative: 2026 Guide

The best cheaper alternative to Manus AI in 2026 depends on what you want Manus to do: cloud-computer task execution, research, app building, or recurring automation. If you want the closest fixed-price replacement, MoClaw is the cleanest $20/month option; if you want free self-hosting, OpenManus or Vellum make more sense. [...] ## FAQ

What is the cheapest alternative to Manus AI?

OpenManus and n8n self-hosted can be free, while Vellum is free under an MIT license for users who want a personal assistant path. For a managed cloud-computer experience closer to Manus, MoClaw is $20/month and NxCode starts at $5/month for app-building workflows.

Is MoClaw cheaper than Manus AI?

MoClaw is not always cheaper than Manus Standard on base price, since both sit around $20/month. It is cheaper in predictability: users get a fixed plan, included credits, immediate access, scheduled tasks, and no surprise task burn from an opaque credit model.

## FAQs

### What Is Manus AI?

Manus is an autonomous AI agent developed by Butterfly Effect and acquired by Meta in December 2025. It breaks goals into steps and executes them in a cloud sandbox using multiple AI models. It launched in March 2025 and is best known for web research, code execution, and its "My Computer" desktop feature launched in March 2026.

### Is Manus Free to Use?

Manus has a free tier with limited credits (300 daily, 1,000 starter). Paid plans start at $19/month. The credit-based system means costs are hard to predict because complex tasks can consume 500 to 900 credits per run, and there's no upfront cost estimate before you start.

### What Is the Best Free Alternative to Manus?
